description: Minimal Claude-Code-like Python coding agent. Features track both product work (test framework, harness scaffold) and product-roadmap work (init/audit commands, memory, skills, multi-agent, observability).

state_machine.rule: Only ./init.sh (or a direct call to a feature's 'verification' command with passing output) may set status='done'. Agents may freely move between the other three states. 'done' is sticky — to re-open a done feature, change status back to 'in-progress' AND remove the 'evidence' field.

features.description: 用户报告 TUI 无流式输出、无法滚动。Root cause: stream_iter 用 yield from asyncio.run(_collect()) 把所有事件收集到一个 list 才 yield,等于 batch 模式。修复:producer thread + queue.Queue 模式,daemon thread 跑 asyncio.run(_consume()),_consume 把每个 event 立即 put 进 queue,generator body yield from queue。cancel() 加 threading.Event 信号让 producer 提前退出。state machine (content_block_start/delta/stop + tool_use) 和 malformed JSON fallback 完整保留。AsyncAnthropic.messages.stream 的事件顺序 + asyncio.run 作为 test seam 的契约兼容 (返回 list 模式仍能驱动 consumer)。

features.name: harness-eval P0: scope subsystem security hardening
features.description: Fix 3 real security holes in the permission subsystem: (1) eval() sandbox in config._compile_check is bypassable via __subclasses__() traversal — replace with AST whitelist; (2) deny_patterns substring matching can be bypassed by hex/base64-encoded commands — add canonicalization step (shlex parse + decode common encodings); (3) deny list is too thin (7 patterns) — expand to ~25 covering network exfil (curl/wget/nc/ssh/scp), fork bombs, code execution (python -c, perl -e), root escalation (su/pkexec), kill -9. Add eval cases locking each new pattern + 1 case proving the AST whitelist rejects __subclasses__ access. Sub-phase of f-harness-eval.

features.name: harness-eval P2: instructions subsystem AGENTS.md to static + cold-start continuity + real token counter
features.description: Move AGENTS.md from compactable Tier 2 to SystemPrompt.static so it (a) survives autocompact and (b) joins the prompt cache segment. Replace context.py:200 character/4 heuristic token estimate with anthropic SDK count_tokens() call (cached per message). Consolidate 5 hard-coded max_tokens=8000 occurrences (context.py:10, llm.py:78, loop.py:188, loop.py:224, tools.py:272) into a single config constant. Sub-phase of f-harness-eval. Lower priority than P0/P1 (no security/correctness impact, only cost + reliability + cross-session continuity).
